projectGoal: Make all 341 official Hyprland scalar rows writable where possible, including officially supported variables/options within those settings, but only when official Hyprland documentation/source supports the behavior and the unified row-driven pipeline proves the row works safely.
recommendedNextSprint: Next high-risk bucket readiness and batching sprint
batchingPolicy: Next work should return to grouped high-risk/bucket-level planning, not further decoration.screen_shader deep-dives.
avoidRabbitHolePolicy: Do not continue one-row deep dives unless explicitly approved or required by a proven current safety failure.
sourceEvidencePolicy: Every future writable row still needs official Hyprland documentation/source evidence or a recorded missing-proof blocker.
writeEnablementPolicy: No row should be enabled without a dedicated approved sprint that proves source-backed validator behavior, fixture/temp write safety, recovery gates when risky, unchanged unrelated rows, and final counts.
proofRequiredForWritable: fixture/temp config write and reread proof
UI warning or advisory separation proof when needed
aggregate report links and regression tests
proofStillMissing: selection of the next grouped high-risk bucket or subset
row-specific source-backed proof for future blocked rows
approved behavior-change sprint before any new row enablement
